channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Diallo goal seals 2-2 draw for Man United against Liverpool
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — Amad Diallo’s late equalizer secured a 2-2 draw for Manchester United against Premier League leader Liverpool on Sunday. The forward turned home Alejandro Garnacho’s cross in the 80th minute at Anfield after Mohamed Salah’s penalty had looking like giving Liverpool the win.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US beats Czechia 4-1 to set up world junior hockey final against Finland
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Boston University's Cole Eiserman broke a second-period tie and the defending champion United States beat Czechia 4-1 on Saturday night to advance to the world junior hockey championship game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Touchdown Tommy! Montana State's Mellott wins Walter Payton Award as top FCS offensive player
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Montana State quarterback Tommy Mellott won the Walter Payton Award as the Football Championship Subdivision offensive player of the year Saturday night, two days before the top-ranked Bobcats face North Dakota State in the title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ravens wrap up the AFC North with a 35-10 rout of Cleveland; Jackson surpasses 4,000 yards passing
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — The road to a division title was bumpy for the Baltimore Ravens, who started 0-2, faced a schedule packed with playoff teams and had to rally from a two-game deficit with four to play.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings buy $2M in tickets at Lions' stadium for division title game, then sell to own fans at discount
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings spent $2 million on about 1,900 tickets for seats located behind the visitor sideline at Ford Field for the game against the Lions Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Victor Wembanyama after 100 games: Set to turn 21, his numbers are staggering
item.description: Victor Wembanyama's days as a 20-year-old in the NBA are over. He turns 21 on Saturday. And on the final day before that birthday, Wembanyama hit another milestone — 100 NBA games.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Soderblom stops 38 shots as Blackhawks end 5-game skid with 4-2 win over Canadiens
item.description: Arvid Soderblom made 38 saves, Nick Foligno scored twice and the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game slide with a 4-2 win over the Montreal Canadiens on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Naval Base San Diego basketball introduces two teams
item.description: The Naval Base San Diego basketball team is led by LaQuan Hansley, the former Triton player-turned-head coach, who revived the program after it was shut down during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford gets home inspected amid string of NFL home burglaries
item.description: A string of high-profile burglaries at the homes of NFL players that has even prompted a warning from the FBI has led one of the brightest stars of Los Angeles to take a proactive approach to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: With chance for 3rd straight win, Bulls fall on road to woeful Wizards, 125-107
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After winning two games in a row to close out 2024, the Bulls seemingly had a great opportunity to kick off 2025 with a third straight victory when they visited the nation's capital on Wednesday night to face the woeful Wizards. Things certainly didn't go as planned for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey sustains leg injury in victory over the Magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit guard Jaden Ivey sustained what appeared to be a severe injury to his lower left leg in the fourth quarter of Detroit's victory over the Orlando Magic on Wednesday night. Orlando's Cole Anthony slipped and fell as he and Ivey went for the ball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Saunders scores 30 as BYU wins Big 12 opener
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored a career-high 30 points and BYU cruised to a 76-56 victory over Arizona State on Tuesday in a Big 12 Conference opener.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami's 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
